description: You are the safety officer for a museum conservation lab auditing the 'wet cleaning' room. Research the fire risks of Linseed Oil, Turpentine, Acetone, Stoddard Solvent, and Hydrogen Peroxide (concentration > 20% but < 60%) using CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). Create a safety report CSV file at /home/ga/Documents/conservation_safety_audit.csv with headers 'Chemical', 'Flash_Point_F', 'Spontaneous_Combustion_Risk', and 'Is_Oxidizer'. The report must contain the Flash Point in degrees Fahrenheit (or 'N/A'), and 'TRUE'/'FALSE' values for spontaneous combustion risk (based on explicit warnings for rags, waste, or self-heating) and oxidizer status for all listed chemicals.
